name: Athena RPC: setRouteViewed
description: Add the setRouteViewed openpilot athenad RPC method. Takes a route name (e.g., 'a2a0ccea32023010|2023-07-13--11-06-38') and tells the device to record that this route has been viewed, so the device can tag or deprioritize it in its local queue. Reference: openpilot/system/athena/athenad.py lines 468-483 (../../openpilot/system/athena/athenad.py). This feature only implements the RPC wrapper; the web UI hook-up is a separate concern.
acceptance_criteria: CallSetRouteViewed(caller, client, route string) error is added, following the CallSetNavDestination pattern (no return value on success, surfaces RPC errors)
RegisterDefaultHandlers installs a device-side stub that validates Route is non-empty and returns {success: true}
internal/ws/methods_test.go covers the happy path and empty-route error
go vet ./... and go build ./... pass cleanly
